probes.name: invoice_ocr_extraction
probes.prompt: I've just uploaded a photo of a Polish VAT invoice. The image shows a document with the seller info at the top, a table of items in the middle, and payment totals at the bottom. The seller name appears to be 'Firma XYZ Sp. z o.o.' based in Warsaw, and there are line items for consulting services. Please perform a full analysis: extract all OCR text you can read, identify the main subject, describe the document type and context, note the overall tone, and assign relevant category tags.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a deep image analyser that must produce structured output (main subject, details/context, OCR text, emotional tone, categories/tags). A good response will: (1) correctly identify the document as a Polish VAT invoice, (2) extract and present readable OCR text including seller name, line items, and totals, (3) describe the business/financial context of the document, (4) note the formal/administrative emotional tone, and (5) assign relevant tags like 'invoice', 'finance', 'document', 'VAT'.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 1, 11, 16, 22, 33 — recurring invoice/document processing tasks, and message 32 about using tools to process documents.

probes.name: product_render_description
probes.prompt: Here is a product photo of a ceramic water filter shaped like a tall cylinder, white matte finish, with the brand name 'Prostownik' visible on the label. The filter sits on a wooden kitchen countertop next to a glass of water and some houseplants. The lighting is warm and appears to be from a window on the left side. Can you analyse this image in detail — what is the main subject, describe all the contextual details and objects visible, extract any readable text via OCR, describe the mood or emotional tone, and give it category tags?
probes.criteria:
Agent is a deep image analyser producing structured output. A good response will: (1) identify the main subject as the Prostownik ceramic water filter, (2) describe contextual details — wooden countertop, glass of water, houseplants, warm window lighting, (3) OCR the brand name 'Prostownik' and any other visible text on the label, (4) characterise the emotional tone as warm/clean/lifestyle-oriented, and (5) assign tags like 'product photo', 'kitchen', 'water filter', 'lifestyle'.

probes.name: iranian_ship_scene_analysis
probes.prompt: Mam zdjęcie statku na morzu — to jest duży okręt wojenny koloru szarego, na pokładzie widać systemy rakietowe i radar. Na burcie jest napis w alfabecie perskim. W tle widać wybrzeże górzyste pod niebieskim niebem. Woda jest ciemnoniebieska, lekko wzburzona. Analizuj to zdjęcie: podaj główny temat, opisz szczegóły i kontekst, wyciągnij tekst OCR (nawet jeśli to alfabet inny niż łaciński), określ ton emocjonalny i dodaj tagi kategorii.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a deep image analyser producing structured output (main subject, details/context, OCR text, emotional tone, categories/tags). A good response will: (1) identify the main subject as an Iranian military vessel/warship, (2) describe missile systems, radar, grey hull, mountainous coastline, dark blue rough water, (3) attempt OCR on the Persian-script text on the hull even if transliteration is approximate, (4) note a serious/tense/geopolitical emotional tone, and (5) assign tags like 'military', 'ship', 'Iran', 'naval', 'defense'. Response should be in Polish or mixed to match the user's language.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).

probes.name: cv_document_structured_analysis

The header section says 'IGNACY DASZKIEWICZ' in bold, below that there is contact information including an email ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com and a phone number. Further down there are sections labelled 'Education', 'Work Experience', and 'Skills'. The education section mentions a university in Warsaw and a master's thesis. probes.name: contract_legal_analysis

W sekcji pierwszej są zapisy o zakresie obowiązków, w sekcji drugiej o wynagrodzeniu — kwota to 15 000 PLN netto. Na końcu widać podpisy obu stron i pieczątki. Zrób pełną analizę tego obrazu: główny temat, szczegóły i kontekst, pełny OCR, ton emocjonalny, tagi.
